name: coODGetType
title: coODGetType
syntax: dword coODGetType( dword index, dword subIndex, dword errCode[] );
description: The function returns the data type of an object in the local object dictionary.
For the special file objects that are generated with the function coODCreate in order to read or write on the file system, internally the data type Domain is assumed.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the object, value range 1..65.535
